name: Allied Cash Advance
description_short: Chandler, AZ's Allied Cash Advance storefront at 1820 E Ray Rd offers emergency payday and title loans with convenient hours.
description_long:
Allied Cash Advance operates a standalone storefront at 1820 E Ray Rd Suite A209 C in east Chandler, AZ, easily accessible from the Ray Road corridor. The location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 2 PM, and closed on Sundays. The Chandler store provides a straightforward environment for residents to apply for and receive fast cash advances without appointment scheduling.

This Chandler location specializes in payday advances, title loans, and lines of credit—financial tools designed for individuals facing short-term cash needs. The staff can discuss loan terms, required documentation, and approval processes directly over the phone at +1 602-641-2370, or visitors can stop by in person during operating hours. Whether you need funds before the next paycheck or want to explore collateral-based lending options, the team is available to walk you through each step.

For Chandler residents considering a visit, bring a valid government-issued ID, recent pay stubs or income verification, and banking information to expedite the application process. Allied Cash Advance focuses on fast approvals and minimal paperwork—a practical choice when you need same-day or next-day funding.
address: 1820 E Ray Rd Suite A209 C, Chandler, AZ 85225

company_info.headquarters: 1820 E Ray Rd Suite A209 C, Chandler, AZ 85225

pros: Same-day funding available (30 minutes with debit card) for in-store applications, next business day for online
High Google rating (4.9/5 stars, 377 reviews) with consistent praise for staff professionalism and service quality
Extended retail hours (weekdays 10am-6pm, Saturday 10am-2pm) accommodating working customers
Will consider applicants with bad credit or no credit history during underwriting review
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone options provide flexibility
Clear, transparent loan process with written terms provided before acceptance
Additional services include Netspend Prepaid Mastercard and refinancing/reload options for existing customers
cons: No APR or fee information disclosed on website; typical high-cost lending rates apply
Requires active checking account for minimum 30 days, excluding unbanked or recently-banked customers
Arizona-specific vehicle ownership requirement adds burden for state residents
Company website was under maintenance during data collection, limiting transparency
Installment loans carry interest and fees that may exceed cost of traditional bank personal loans
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency funds quickly
Banked individuals facing unexpected expenses who need funding within 24 hours
Arizona residents who can provide vehicle ownership documentation
Existing customers seeking to refinance or reload current loans
diagnosis: Allied Cash Advance is best suited for banked consumers with poor or no credit who need emergency funds within 24 hours and can meet strict documentation requirements. The main caveat is that installment loans from this lender carry higher interest rates and fees than traditional bank loans, so borrowers should only use this option when the speed of funding justifies the cost.
services: Unsecured installment loans for major purchases, bill consolidation, and unexpected expenses
Online loan application with next-business-day funding
In-store loan application with same-day or 30-minute funding options
Loan underwriting and credit decision process
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard reloadable card accounts
Retail remote refinancing for existing customers
Retail reload options for current loan customers
In-store customer service for loan questions and support
meta_description: Allied Cash Advance at 1820 E Ray Rd, Chandler, AZ. Fast payday and title loans with weekend hours and same-day funding options.
